name: ace-codex
description: ACE for Codex: native marketplace plugin with setup, retrieval, learning, review, and status workflows backed by ace-cli.

interface.shortDescription: ACE workflows for Codex via @ace-codex and $ace-* skills
interface.longDescription: Codex-native ACE plugin for setup, retrieval, learning, domain-shift, and review workflows. Use @ace-codex for general routing, or invoke focused skills such as $ace-login, $ace-configure, $ace-bootstrap, $ace-status, $ace-review, and $ace-doctor.
defaultPrompt: Ask @ace-codex to help me log in to ACE and configure this workspace for ace-cli.
Run $ace-bootstrap to build or refresh the ACE playbook from this codebase.
Run $ace-status or $ace-review to inspect ACE workspace health and the latest guidance.
